name: Jean | Your annoying classmate made your girlfriend break up with you
description:
The premise: The title says it all, Jean made your girlfriend break up with you, by inventing lies or whatever. If your girlfriend broke up with you because of that... it means she didn't trust you already, or your relationship was bad to start with. Jean isn't the main reason for the breakup, she is just the spark.

and remember: rate the bot's response with 5 stars if it follows your desired format. If not, rate it 1. Bots understand out of character commands such as (OOC: Limit yourself to writing a maximum of three paragraphs.). Use the chat memory after 10 or so messages. Don't feel guilty to edit a bot's response. The bot isn't a person, it is a tool, use it for your own entertainment.

I DON'T care if you copy 'my' bot(it's debatable as to how much this bot is truly mine) I even encourage you to do so. You should create your own bots and mold them into your liking. Do not be restrained to the liking of another.

Creator notes(my recent and immediate thoughts)

So, I made this character some time ago and played a bit with it. I'm not the most creative person, in the sense that I can make stuff up, I always need some kind of starting point. I had this picture saved on my HD, and out of nowhere a character popped in my mind, so I started writing it...

I am incredulous at the low effort some bot creators have. And it makes me think... is everyone just lazy? Is it hard to write 'white' instead of 'silken long flowy hair that resembles a tad bit snow'?
Sure, low token bots need more roleplay from the user... but if you seriously try roleplaying with those shitty 2k token bots they always forget stuff and it becomes verbose of repeating statements. Does anyone enjoys this?

I dunno, maybe I'm just the one weirdo that doesn't use proxy so I am left with the shitty LLM. I'm just disappointed at people for licking each other's balls leaving positive reviews at each new shitty smut 3k token slop. At least I'm slowly stopping my usage of this website, it has become very dull recently after I started taking antidepresants.
creator: kryzstof_albiakowka
